ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the doctor providing the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was provided */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis leading to the treatment */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the type of treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment */,
  "entitlement" TEXT /* Entitlement type for the patient (e.g., S2) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be taken (e.g., view patient record) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Patient's insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment being billed */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid for the treatment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the patient receiving the treatment
Unique identifier for the doctor providing the treatment
Standardized code for the type of treatment
